purpose: Fix 3 issues from Codex review: role swap, short SHAs, stale acceptance text
notes: Codex review (M0002) found 3 issues: (1) role-based challenge expectations swapped between AGENTS.md and PROTOCOL.md, (2) M0001/M0002 used short/placeholder SHAs instead of 40-char per template spec, (3) M0002 acceptance text referenced 1 message but queue had 2.
